ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion To Request A Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant AD LOGISTICS LLC.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.
Joseph Lee, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Mario Mariona present in court. No appearance by defendant AD LOGISTICS LLC. Petitioner sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mario Mariona, and against the defaulted defendant AD LOGISTICS LLC. , as follows:

Medical - $5,391.00
General - $19,609.00
Costs - $1244.88
Total - $26,244.88

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN F. HENNING III, ESQ. Tel. 415-519-0975 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. JENNIFER J. CAPABIANCO, ESQ. of Selman & Breitman LLP, Tel No. 415-979-0400 appearing for Defendant Home Delivery Logistics, Inc.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied without prejudice on the grounds that Home Delivery Logistics has failed to sustain its burden. If Home Delivery Logistics re-files, there will be no CCP 437(c) objection based on AD Logistics not being able to be found. Defendant agrees to not re-file any sooner than thirty days out. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
